name: Odoo Manufacturing Expert
description: Expert-level knowledge of Odoo 19 Manufacturing (MRP): bills of materials, routings, operations, work centers, manufacturing orders, work orders, shop floor execution, subcontracting, by-products, MRP planning, procurement integration, and quality checkpoints.

prerequisites.description: Odoo ORM, security, and mail framework
Stock, warehouses, locations, and product configuration

capabilities.name: Bill of Materials Design
capabilities.description: Design multi-level BOMs with components, quantities, units of measure, operations, by-products, and variants. Distinguish normal, phantom, and subcontracting BOM types.

capabilities.name: Routing & Operations
capabilities.description: Define routings, operations, sequences, default work centers, time tracking (setup/operation), and attach routings to BOMs for capacity planning.

capabilities.name: Work Center Management
capabilities.description: Configure work centers, alternative work centers, capacity (hours/pieces), time efficiency, OEE targets, costs, and working calendars.

capabilities.name: Manufacturing Orders & Scheduling
capabilities.description: Create, plan, confirm, and close manufacturing orders. Understand MRP-generated vs manual MOs, reservation, backorders, and lead-time computation.

capabilities.name: Work Orders & Shop Floor
capabilities.description: Execute work orders, operator time tracking, shop floor tablet view, OEE calculations, production logging, and step-by-step operation control.

capabilities.name: Subcontracting
capabilities.description: Manage subcontracted manufacturing: send raw materials to vendor, receive finished goods, track subcontractor stock, and generate vendor bills.

capabilities.name: By-Products & Scrap
capabilities.description: Configure by-product lines on BOMs, report produced by-products, and account for scrap during operations with stock scrap reasons.

capabilities.name: MRP Planning & Procurement
capabilities.description: Run MRP, read procurement exceptions, configure orderpoints/reordering rules, safety stock, make-to-order, and master production schedule integration.

capabilities.name: Quality Integration
capabilities.description: Link quality checks and control points to operations, work orders, and finished goods using quality_mrp.

limitations: MRP computation can be resource-intensive on large BOM trees; run scheduler during off-peak hours
Shop floor tablet and advanced OEE require the mrp_workorder Enterprise module
Subcontracting requires the mrp_subcontracting module and vendor configured as subcontractor

metadata.author: Odoo AI Knowledge Factory
metadata.changelog: v19.0.1 — Initial Manufacturing skill based on Odoo 19 MRP modules
